title: MCP tool registry and discovery
description: Implement MCP tool registry with discovery endpoint. Add tool versioning, health checks, and capability negotiation. Expose via /api/v1/mcp/tools/discover.

title: Minimal plugin surface
description: Create plugin interface with lifecycle hooks (init, execute, teardown). Add plugin validation, sandboxing, and hot-reload support. Minimum 3 sample plugins.

title: Governance docs and cadence
description: Create governance documentation: policy change process, constitution amendment workflow, oracle mode procedures. Add governance audit trail.

title: MCP endpoints enriched
description: Add MCP server health monitoring, tool execution metrics, connection pooling stats. Extend /api/v1/mcp/servers with health, latency, error rate fields.

title: Sample tools
description: Create 5 sample MCP tools: file reader, web scraper, code formatter, data transformer, notification sender. Each with input/output schemas and tests.

title: Marketplace scaffolding
description: Create marketplace UI surface: tool listing, search, install/uninstall flow. Add tool rating, review system, and trust indicators.

title: Create Phase 4 runbook
description: Create runbook for MCP incident response: server disconnect, tool failure, marketplace issues. Include debug commands and escalation paths.

title: Update parity scorecard for MCP axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for MCP/Tools axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 4 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 4.1-4.5. Document results in phase4_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 5.
